title: USD/JPY
text: USD/JPY trading above 158.00, approaching the 160.00 level that has previously triggered BoJ verbal warnings; intervention risk rises on a sustained break above 160.

title: AUD/USD
text: AUD/USD long% at 71.1% and retail sentiment at 10% long, 90% short, indicating potential squeeze risk; AUD/USD holds above 0.7191.

title: EUR/USD
text: Fed-ECB 175bp differential weighs on EUR/USD; pair holds at 1.182, with ECB officials leaning toward April rate hold.

title: Risk Regime
text: VIX at 18.2 signals normal volatility — risk-on environment, S&P 500 up +0.80%.

title: USD/JPY Correlation Break
text: USD/JPY vs VIX correlation breaks at +0.674, norm +0.062, z +1.58σ, indicating JPY no longer acting as safe haven.
